posts.author: maninder.nitw
posts.text: 350 !! Lifetime high on ceo resignation I am sure market knows the name of new ceo !

posts.author: Lighty
posts.text: I guess that is why market is real happy with the resignation.

posts.author: Omkar_Ranjan
posts.text: A fresher also would not write a resignation mail like this ..that too when one must be aware that this will be put in public domain

posts.author: Omkar_Ranjan
posts.text: New CEO joined in August 2025, took 4 months medical leave in February 2026, Chairman mentioned that they will wait for him to join back and his health is improving when there was a question on finding his replacement and now he resigned with gardening leave till December 2026, to pusue other personal and professional interests. Why can’t people be transparent …

posts.author: maninder.nitw
posts.text: Also i think market knew this is coming ( med leaves etc already taken ). Interesting i think market is also anticipating a new better ceo and hence all time high by stock with decent volume!

posts.author: maninder.nitw
posts.text: Thats the problem, chairman may not allow ceo to work independently and bain must have understood this too. Lets see, what happens next !

posts.author: Gaurav_Catalyst
posts.text: What a simple, plain text Resignation email from ECO to Chairman. He was on medical leave from last two quarters. Wondering how Bain Capital trusted on this fellow to turnaround Manappuram. Or It is too difficult to work with VP Nandkumar that CEO first went on medical leave and then even resigned. A short term set back on the day Manappuram touched life time high. Also, Resignation email received before 12 noon, but company disclosing post market hours. image 1129×542 58.9 KB
